---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or a new feature
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve, and for whom?

## Proposed solution

A clear, concise description of what you would like to happen. Include UI sketches or API shape suggestions if helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered, and why you preferred this one.

## Domain context

Is this feature mentioned (or contradicted) in [base-instructions.md](../base-instructions.md)? If so, where?

## Additional context

Anything else that helps make the case.
